TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Laygi_go, title = Laygi_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Laygi_go} }

S.FORM: Laygi go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 162.27 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 70.84 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 86.37 km²), 7,556 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,230 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 7,327 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Laygi go ays psgayun 7 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura .

Laygi go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 162.27 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 70.84 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 86.37 km²), 7,556 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,230 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 7,327 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Laygi go ays psgayun 7 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura .
S.PHON: lajɣi ɣo mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu lajɣi ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, kuljaljau , *uŋali* , pajljus~ɕ , ʦ~ʨalas~ɕi* , tjuwaqau , s~ɕilje*a*a* , tjanaʔas~ɕija , puʦ~ʨunuɣ , tjaljaʔa*us~ɕ , takamimura .
